productName: .75g Trichome InTERPreter Pre-Rolls, 6pk - Ice Cream Cake Bx1+AF - 4.5g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Ice Cream Cake flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of vanilla, butter, and pepper, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
